name: GumOps Engine
description: Direct Gumroad API engine for seller operations: products, sales, analytics, refunds, and working memory. Uses GUMROAD_ACCESS_TOKEN from environment.

tools.name: gum_health_check
tools.description: Ping the Gumroad API and return a health report. Checks token presence, /user reachability, /products reachability, and latency for each endpoint. Use this first when the API connection is unknown or broken.

tools.name: gum_account_info
tools.description: Return account info for the configured Gumroad seller: name, email, product count, and sales count.

tools.name: gum_list_products
tools.description: List Gumroad products for the seller. Returns id, name, and permalink for each product.

tools.name: gum_get_product
tools.description: Get full details for a single Gumroad product by ID.

tools.name: gum_find_product
tools.description: Find a Gumroad product by name (case-insensitive). Returns the first match.

name.description: The product name to search for.

tools.name: gum_sales_summary
tools.description: Return a high-level summary of all Gumroad sales: total count, total revenue, and total refunds.

tools.name: gum_sales_by_product
tools.description: Return sales grouped and totalled by product ID.

tools.name: gum_sales_by_month
tools.description: Return sales grouped by month (YYYY-MM), with count and revenue per month.

tools.name: gum_top_products
tools.description: Return the top N Gumroad products ranked by total revenue.

top_n.description: Number of top products to return (default: 5).

tools.name: gum_top_customers
tools.description: Return the top N Gumroad customers ranked by total spend.

top_n.description: Number of top customers to return (default: 5).

tools.name: gum_find_sales_by_email
tools.description: Find all Gumroad sales made by a specific buyer email address.

email.description: Buyer email address to search for.

tools.name: gum_sales_report
tools.description: Generate a comprehensive Gumroad sales report: overall summary, monthly breakdown, by-product breakdown, top products, and top customers.

tools.name: gum_compare_months
tools.description: Compare Gumroad sales between two months. Returns counts, revenue, and differences.

tools.name: gum_customer_report
tools.description: Generate a full report for a specific customer: all their purchases and total spend.

tools.name: gum_product_report
tools.description: Generate a report for a specific product: info, sales summary, and individual sale records.

tools.name: gum_refund_preview
tools.description: Preview a Gumroad refund (dry run). Shows what would happen without executing the refund.

sale_id.description: The Gumroad sale ID to preview refund for.

amount.description: Partial refund amount in dollars. Omit for full refund.

tools.name: gum_refund_sale
tools.description: Refund a Gumroad sale by ID. Omit amount for a full refund. This action is irreversible.

sale_id.description: The Gumroad sale ID to refund.

amount.description: Partial refund amount in dollars. Omit for full refund.

tools.approval_reason: Refunding a sale sends money back to the buyer and cannot be undone.

tools.name: gum_refresh_memory
tools.description: Fetch the latest products, sales summary, and account info from Gumroad and store them in working memory.

tools.name: gum_memory_list
tools.description: List all keys stored in the GumOps working memory store.

tools.name: gum_memory_get
tools.description: Retrieve a working memory entry by key.

tools.name: gum_memory_add
tools.description: Add or update a working memory entry by key.

value.description: The value to store (string or JSON).

tools.name: gum_memory_find
tools.description: Search working memory entries by matching a query string against keys, values, and metadata.

tools.name: gum_memory_summary
tools.description: Return a timestamped summary of recent working memory items.
